_comment: Defaults for `python -m cli perceive`. labeler/prompt_file are only consulted when detector=='labeled-gdino' (or its 'gemini+gdino' alias). workers=null = torch.cuda.device_count(); 0 disables the multi-GPU pre-pass. n_votes / vote_temperature must match the values used at the label stage so the cache_tag (cache/labels/<spec>__voteN/) lines up. vote_strategy controls how the detector consumes the N runs.
